xma.xmaTitle:
love_animalsgram Rare moment by @karl.ramsdell ☺️ These tiny babies are no bigger than a cotton ball… and within hours, they’re already walking on their own.

Born right on open beaches, they rely on perfect camouflage to survive - blending into the sand as if they were never there.

A fragile little family in a big, dangerous world ❤️

Courtesy @karl.ramsdell

xma.xmaTitle:
unbustable.nuttt 🇸🇬 싱가포르는 빗물을 식수로 바꾸고 있습니다 💧

NEWater 시스템을 통해 물은 고급 여과, 역삼투(RO), 자외선(UV) 처리를 거쳐 안정적이고 지속 가능한 수자원으로 재생됩니다. 이 기술은 국가 인프라와 자원 관리 효율성을 높이는 핵심 솔루션으로 활용되고 있습니다.
این سیستم نمونه‌ای از فناوری پیشرفته، زیرساخت پایدار و مدیریت هوشمند منابع است که آب را به یک منبع قابل اعتماد تبدیل می‌کند.

xma.xmaTitle:
scooby I can legally drive blind thanks to the trucks with the lights 

Driving is one of the most widespread and consequential everyday activities in modern society, shaping economies, infrastructure, and personal freedom on a global scale. Since the mass adoption of automobiles in the early 20th century, particularly with the introduction of the Ford Model T in 1908, driving has transformed from a luxury into a near necessity for millions. Today, over 1.4 billion vehicles are in operation worldwide, and road networks connect even the most remote regions. In the United States alone, driving remains the dominant mode of transportation, with the average person traveling over 13,000 miles per year. Beyond convenience, driving has influenced urban planning, giving rise to suburbs, highway systems like the Interstate Highway System established in 1956, and a culture centered around mobility and independence.

However, driving also carries significant risks and responsibilities that have prompted ongoing regulation and technological innovation. According to the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration, tens of thousands of fatalities occur annually on U.S. roads, with factors such as speeding, impaired driving, and distracted driving contributing heavily. In response, advancements like seat belts, airbags, anti-lock braking systems, and modern driver-assistance technologies have significantly improved safety outcomes over time. More recently, the development of electric vehicles and autonomous driving systems signals a major shift in how driving may evolve in the coming decades. While the core act of operating a vehicle remains a daily routine for many, its broader impact on public safety, environmental sustainability, and technological progress continues to make driving a central issue in contemporary life. #Driving #Transportation #RoadSafety #AutomotiveHistory #ModernLife

Beyond convenience, driving has influenced urban planning, giving rise to suburbs, highway systems like the Interstate Highway System established in 1956, and a culture centered around mobility and independence.

However, driving also carries significant risks and responsibilities that have prompted ongoing regulation and technological innovation. In response, advancements like seat belts, airbags, anti-lock braking systems, and modern driver-assistance technologies have significantly improved safety outcomes over time. More recently, the development of electric vehicles and autonomous driving systems signals a major shift in how driving may evolve in the coming decades. While the core act of operating a vehicle remains a daily routine for many, its broader impact on public safety, environmental sustainability, and technological progress continues to make driving a central issue in contemporary life. #Driving #Transportation #RoadSafety #AutomotiveHistory #ModernLife

xma.xmaTitle:
etcikitchen 🔥 ArrDee × GymSkin 🔥

Good food brings good people together — and today was a big one 🖤

We had the pleasure of welcoming @arrdeegram & @gymskin to Etci Kitchen. Two incredible individuals with massive energy and even bigger followings — and genuinely great people to have in the restaurant.

Moments like this mean a lot to us. Thank you for choosing Etci 🖤

𝑩𝒐𝒐𝒌 𝒀𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝑻𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒆 𝑵𝒐𝒘!

🌐 http://www.etcikitchen.com/index.php/contact-us
📞 012737 25806
📍47 Preston St, Brighton BN1 2HP

#EtciKitchen #Brighton #BrightonEats #GymSkin #ArrDee

A fragile little family in a big, dangerous world ❤️

xma.xmaTitle:
unbustable.nuttt 🇸🇬 싱가포르는 빗물을 식수로 바꾸고 있습니다 💧

NEWater 시스템을 통해 물은 고급 여과, 역삼투(RO), 자외선(UV) 처리를 거쳐 안정적이고 지속 가능한 수자원으로 재생됩니다. 이 기술은 국가 인프라와 자원 관리 효율성을 높이는 핵심 솔루션으로 활용되고 있습니다.
این سیستم نمونه‌ای از فناوری پیشرفته، زیرساخت پایدار و مدیریت هوشمند منابع است که آب را به یک منبع قابل اعتماد تبدیل می‌کند.

xma.xmaTitle:
scooby I can legally drive blind thanks to the trucks with the lights 

Driving is one of the most widespread and consequential everyday activities in modern society, shaping economies, infrastructure, and personal freedom on a global scale. Since the mass adoption of automobiles in the early 20th century, particularly with the introduction of the Ford Model T in 1908, driving has transformed from a luxury into a near necessity for millions. Today, over 1.4 billion vehicles are in operation worldwide, and road networks connect even the most remote regions. In the United States alone, driving remains the dominant mode of transportation, with the average person traveling over 13,000 miles per year. Beyond convenience, driving has influenced urban planning, giving rise to suburbs, highway systems like the Interstate Highway System established in 1956, and a culture centered around mobility and independence.

However, driving also carries significant risks and responsibilities that have prompted ongoing regulation and technological innovation. According to the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration, tens of thousands of fatalities occur annually on U.S. roads, with factors such as speeding, impaired driving, and distracted driving contributing heavily. In response, advancements like seat belts, airbags, anti-lock braking systems, and modern driver-assistance technologies have significantly improved safety outcomes over time. More recently, the development of electric vehicles and autonomous driving systems signals a major shift in how driving may evolve in the coming decades. While the core act of operating a vehicle remains a daily routine for many, its broader impact on public safety, environmental sustainability, and technological progress continues to make driving a central issue in contemporary life. #Driving #Transportation #RoadSafety #AutomotiveHistory #ModernLife

xma.xmaTitle:
beliefcheck Yes, absolutely. Imran Khan said “absolutely not,” but only to a journalist not directly to the United States. During his government, until it began to weaken, no one can show even a single statement of his that was anti-America or anti-establishment. He only became anti-America and anti-establishment after his government ended.

From jail, Imran Khan can tweet against his own country’s institutions, but during the Isr@el–P@lestine war, he did not make a single tweet against Isr@el. Even during the Isr@el–Iran tensions, he did not post a single tweet against Isr@el.
